overall.description: A first-person walk along a sandy beach boardwalk during golden hour sunset, passing palm trees and a rustic beach bar with 'BROKEN' signage. The scene is rendered in a video game engine, featuring warm orange lighting, scattered lounge chairs, and an empty coastal resort atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach boardwalk with bar and lounge chairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk toward the sunset, passing beach lounge chairs and palm trees

entered.detail: group of tall palm trees with dense fronds lining the left side of the boardwalk
rustic wooden beach bar with 'BROKEN' signage and open-air counter
weathered wooden planks forming a sandy path toward the ocean
empty white reclining chairs scattered on the sand beside the path
stacked white barrels with green rims near the beach bar entrance
straw beach umbrellas providing shade near the bar area
calm sea meeting the sky with bright sun setting on the horizon

segments.scene_description: A serene first-person walk along a wooden beach boardwalk during golden hour. The camera moves steadily forward toward the setting sun, flanked by palm trees on the left and a rustic beach bar on the right. The scene is devoid of people, featuring only scattered lounge chairs, storage barrels, and the gentle glow of the ocean ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a wooden boardwalk that leads from a rustic resort area toward the open horizon of a setting sun. It begins with a steady forward glide, passing under the canopy of palm trees on the left while a quiet beach bar unfolds on the right. As the camera advances, the environment opens up to reveal scattered lounge chairs and storage barrels bathed in a warm, golden glow. The scene then shifts its focus toward the distant coastline, where the wooden path terminates at the shimmering expanse of the ocean under a deepening sunset sky.
